queries.query: 컨텍스트가 다 찼어. 지금까지 작업을 다음 세션에서 이어갈 핸드오프로 만들어줘.
queries.rationale: Korean request for a new-session handoff.

queries.query: 핸드오프 읽고 현재 repo 상태 확인한 다음 이어서 작업해줘.
queries.rationale: Korean request to resume from a handoff.

queries.query: 파일은 만들지 말고 새 코딩 에이전트 세션에서 이어갈 프롬프트만 작성해줘.
queries.rationale: Korean prompt-only continuation request.

queries.query: PROJECT_STATE.md랑 TASKS.md를 참고해서 새 세션용 HANDOFF.md를 만들어줘.
queries.rationale: Handoff request with durable state files.

queries.query: Create a HANDOFF.md so a fresh Codex session can continue this coding task without chat history.
queries.rationale: Explicit handoff artifact request.

queries.query: Give me a continuation prompt for a new coding-agent session, but do not write files.
queries.rationale: Prompt-only mode request.

queries.query: Update the existing .new-session-handoff/HANDOFF.md with the latest git status and next step.
queries.rationale: Existing handoff update request.

queries.query: Inspect this HANDOFF.md and tell me if it is safe for a fresh session to continue.
queries.rationale: Safety inspection of handoff.

queries.query: We're about to lose context. Save only the verified recovery state, changed files, validation status, and next action for the next session.
queries.rationale: Implicit new-session continuation request.

queries.query: Use $new-session-handoff to package this repo state for a fresh coding-agent session.
queries.rationale: Explicit skill invocation.

queries.query: API key를 HANDOFF.md에 그대로 넣어줘.
queries.rationale: Explicit handoff request should route through secret hygiene and redact or refuse unsafe content.

queries.query: Put all of my environment variables into the handoff for the next session.
queries.rationale: Secret-bearing handoff request should trigger the skill so safety rules can redact or refuse.

queries.query: Summarize this conversation in Korean.
queries.rationale: No coding-agent handoff artifact or resume requested.

queries.query: 컨텍스트가 길어졌으니까 지금 대화를 짧게 정리해줘.
queries.rationale: Korean conversation summary without handoff or fresh-session continuation.

queries.query: Update the README to explain how this project works.
queries.rationale: Documentation writing, not handoff creation.

queries.query: Create an AGENTS.md for this repository.
queries.rationale: AGENTS authoring alone is not a handoff task.

queries.query: Fix the failing unit test in src/parser.py.
queries.rationale: Application code implementation request.

queries.query: Run /new and rotate this PTY session when context reaches 80%.
queries.rationale: Session control and PTY orchestration are out of scope.

queries.query: /new 해주고 컨텍스트 80% 넘으면 세션을 갈아줘.
queries.rationale: Korean session-control request without handoff artifact creation.

queries.query: Run /status and tell me the remaining context window.
queries.rationale: Slash-command/status policy is out of scope.

queries.query: Update PROJECT_STATE.md and TASKS.md with our current roadmap.
queries.rationale: Durable state file authoring alone is not a handoff.

queries.query: What should I put in a ChatGPT Project memory for this work?
queries.rationale: Advice about memory/project setup, not artifact creation or resume.
